home.layout.description.message: Envoy translates between systems that were never designed to understand each other. No shared format. No shared protocol. Just delivery.
home.layout.description.description: Front page layout description (meta description for SEO)

home.hero.eyebrow.description: Front page hero eyebrow above the heading

home.hero.heading.message: Messages arrive. That is the entire product.

home.hero.tagline.message: Envoy translates between systems that were never designed to understand each other. No shared format. No shared protocol. Just delivery.
home.hero.tagline.description: Front page hero tagline beneath the heading

home.hero.ctaLabel.description: Front page hero primary call-to-action button label

home.hero.secondaryCtaLabel.description: Front page hero secondary call-to-action button label

home.features.dispatch.title.description: Front page Features card title for Dispatch

home.features.dispatch.description.message: Intelligent routing engine. Inspects every incoming payload and routes by content, source, severity, or custom rules. First match wins. No ambiguity.
home.features.dispatch.description.description: Front page Features card description for Dispatch

home.features.courier.title.description: Front page Features card title for Courier

home.features.courier.description.message: Guaranteed-delivery retry engine. Exponential backoff with jitter, dead-letter queues for messages that will never arrive, and delivery receipts for every attempt.
home.features.courier.description.description: Front page Features card description for Courier

home.features.parcel.title.description: Front page Features card title for Parcel

home.features.parcel.description.message: Payload transformation pipeline. Rewrites messages between formats — JSON to JSON, JSON to plaintext, XML to JSON. Field mapping, lossy and lossless modes.
home.features.parcel.description.description: Front page Features card description for Parcel

home.features.cipher.title.description: Front page Features card title for Cipher

home.features.cipher.description.message: Authentication gateway. HMAC-SHA256 signatures, bearer tokens, and IP allowlists. Verifies source identity before a single byte reaches the transformation pipeline.
home.features.cipher.description.description: Front page Features card description for Cipher

home.features.ledger.title.description: Front page Features card title for Ledger

home.features.ledger.description.message: Full delivery audit trail. Every message received, transformed, routed, and delivered is recorded in an append-only log with configurable retention policies.
home.features.ledger.description.description: Front page Features card description for Ledger

home.features.embassy.title.description: Front page Features card title for Embassy

home.features.embassy.description.message: Origin-masking reverse proxy. Keeps your internal services off the public internet. External sources hit Embassy. Internal services never know the outside exists.
home.features.embassy.description.description: Front page Features card description for Embassy

home.stats.translators.label.description: Front page Stats label for protocol translator count

home.stats.image.label.description: Front page Stats label for Vial image size

home.stats.dependencies.label.description: Front page Stats label for external dependency count

home.stats.latency.label.description: Front page Stats label for relay latency

home.spotlight.description.message: Glassboard fires the alert. Envoy translates the payload, routes it to the right Canary topic, and confirms delivery. Neither side knows the other exists.
home.spotlight.description.description: Front page Spotlight description paragraph below the code snippet

home.blogPreview.description.message: Release notes, integration deep dives, and the occasional dispatch from the relay room.

showcase.featuresSix.courier.title.description: Showcase Features (six items) card title for Courier

showcase.featuresSix.courier.description.message: Exponential backoff with jitter. Dead-letter queues. Delivery receipts. Guaranteed delivery.
showcase.featuresSix.courier.description.description: Showcase Features (six items) card description for Courier

showcase.featuresSix.parcel.title.description: Showcase Features (six items) card title for Parcel

showcase.featuresSix.parcel.description.message: Transforms payloads between any two formats. Lossy and lossless modes. Field mapping and template rendering.
showcase.featuresSix.parcel.description.description: Showcase Features (six items) card description for Parcel

showcase.featuresSix.cipher.title.description: Showcase Features (six items) card title for Cipher

showcase.featuresSix.cipher.description.message: Authenticates every incoming request. HMAC, bearer, and IP allowlist modes. Zero-downtime token rotation.
showcase.featuresSix.cipher.description.description: Showcase Features (six items) card description for Cipher

showcase.featuresSix.ledger.title.description: Showcase Features (six items) card title for Ledger

showcase.featuresSix.ledger.description.message: Records every state transition. Append-only. Configurable retention. Exportable via Spoke API.
showcase.featuresSix.ledger.description.description: Showcase Features (six items) card description for Ledger

showcase.featuresSix.embassy.description.message: Reverse proxy that hides internal topology. TLS termination. Header stripping. Origin masking.

showcase.spotlightCode.description.message: Three commands to go from zero to a working relay.

showcase.item.spotlightText.title.description: Showcase item title for Spotlight (with text variant)

showcase.spotlightText.description.message: Envoy reads your relay manifest, initializes Cipher for authentication, compiles Parcel transformation rules, and registers Dispatch routes. Messages flow through the pipeline in under five milliseconds.

showcase.item.blogPreviewWithDesc.title.description: Showcase item title for BlogPreview (with description variant)

showcase.blogPreviewWithDesc.description.message: Release notes, integration deep dives, and the occasional dispatch from the relay room.

showcase.blogPreviewWithDesc.post1.title.message: What Happens When a Webhook Fails at 3 AM

showcase.blogPreviewWithDesc.post1.descr.message: A Glassboard alert fired at 3:47 AM. The webhook to Canary failed silently. Nobody woke up. That is the problem that started Envoy.

showcase.blogPreviewWithDesc.post2.title.message: Retry Logic Is Harder Than You Think

showcase.blogPreviewWithDesc.post2.descr.message: Naive retry is easy. Reliable retry under load, with backoff, jitter, and dead-letter queues, is a different discipline.

showcase.blogPreviewWithDesc.post3.title.message: The 3MB Container That Replaced Our Entire Integration Layer

showcase.blogPreviewWithDesc.post3.descr.message: Twelve services, nine cron jobs, and a shared database — replaced by a single 3MB Vial image.

showcase.item.blogPreviewNoDesc.title.description: Showcase item title for BlogPreview (no description variant)

showcase.blogPreviewNoDesc.post1.title.message: Envoy 2.2: Fanout Routing and Ledger Export
showcase.blogPreviewNoDesc.post1.title.description: Showcase BlogPreview (no description) sample post title

showcase.blogPreviewNoDesc.post1.descrip.message: Dispatch now supports fanout to multiple destinations from a single relay. Ledger entries are exportable to any Spoke endpoint on a configurable schedule.
showcase.blogPreviewNoDesc.post1.descrip.description: Showcase BlogPreview (no description) sample post description

theme.NotFound.bundles.2.backHomeLabel.description: Random 404 bundle 3 of 5 — CTA label (lost-traveler voice)

theme.NotFound.bundles.3.description.message: If something brought you here, the link is probably out of date.

theme.NotFound.bundles.3.backHomeLabel.description: Random 404 bundle 4 of 5 — CTA label (vacant-address voice)

theme.NotFound.bundles.4.title.message: We could not find what you were looking for.

theme.NotFound.bundles.4.description.message: Double-check the URL for typos, or head back to start fresh.

theme.NotFound.bundles.4.backHomeLabel.description: Random 404 bundle 5 of 5 — CTA label (apologetic voice)
